title: Squirrel Removal in Borough Park, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from attics, walls & chimneys. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900-$2,500.
intro: Squirrels invading your Borough Park home through the attic, chimney, or roof? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, humane squirrel removal services throughout this bustling Brooklyn neighborhood. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in Borough Park's multi-family homes and residential properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Borough Park residents for years with safe, effective squirrel removal that protects both your property and local wildlife. Our licensed team offers same-day emergency service, complete exclusion work, and guaranteed results tailored to Brooklyn's specific building codes and housing structures.
localContext: Borough Park's densely populated blocks, mature trees along 13th Avenue and New Utrecht Avenue, and mix of single-family homes and multi-unit dwellings create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. From the historic synagogues to the busy commercial corridors, our team knows how to navigate Borough Park's unique architecture while providing discreet, efficient pest control services.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Borough Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Borough Park typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. Multi-family buildings or homes with significant attic damage may be on the higher end. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Borough Park homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Borough Park homes through roof vents, damaged soffit areas, uncapped chimneys, and gaps where the roof meets the walls. The neighborhood's mature trees provide easy access to rooflines, and older homes may have deteriorated wood or openings that squirrels can chew through to create entry points.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in Borough Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, ethical methods for squirrel removal in Borough Park. Our approach includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not re-enter, and relocation following New York State guidelines. We never use poison or inhumane traps, ensuring compliance with local wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Borough Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Borough Park residents. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, including trapping, exclusion, and initial repairs. The timeline depends on the number of squirrels, accessibility of entry points, and whether babies are present (which require special handling). We'll provide a clear timeline during your free inspection.
